## Term

The proposed term (e.g. `framework` ID, `capability.id` pattern, `violation_flags` code).

## Category

- [ ] `regulatory.classifications.framework`
- [ ] `regulatory.classifications.category`
- [ ] `capability.id` domain or pattern
- [ ] `policy.violation_flags`
- [ ] Other

## Definition

Clear definition of the term.

## Usage Context

When/how would this term be used?

## Reference

Link to regulation, standard, or documentation (if applicable).
